name: Chaos Wielder +Supp: Steinsopp // Free Live
description:
Chaos Wielder (SE)
Swedish sludge/doom force born from the ashes of Wournos, Chaos Wielder delivers crushing, riff-driven heaviness with a raw, Hellhammer-inspired edge. Formed in Stockholm, the band blends slow-burning doom with filthy sludge grooves, creating a dense and oppressive live sound.  ￼

Steinsopp (NO)
Norway’s own Steinsopp conjures psychedelic stoner/doom straight from the forest. Their sound is a hazy mix of heavy riffs, spacey jams, and dark, trippy atmospheres—like a late-night wander through a sonic mushroom trip.
